ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Broad theme of the indicator (e.g., Reproductive Healthcare) */,
  "subtheme" TEXT /* Specific subtheme of the indicator (e.g., Family Planning Needs) */,
  "valence" TEXT /* Valence indicating positive or negative health outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator being measured */,
  "population" TEXT /* Target population for the indicator */,
  "geo_precision" TEXT /* Geographical precision of the data (e.g., County, State) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source providing the information for the indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Specific healthcare provider or clinic */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., contraceptive, abortion) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the service */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_subtheme FOREIGN KEY ("subtheme") REFERENCES subthemes ("subtheme_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_valence FOREIGN KEY ("valence") REFERENCES valences ("valence_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_geo_precision FOREIGN KEY ("geo_precision") REFERENCES geo_precisions ("precision_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_theme FOREIGN KEY ("theme") REFERENCES themes ("theme_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_description"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_population FOREIGN KEY ("population") REFERENCES populations ("population_description")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the theme is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the theme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the theme was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subthemes" (
  "subtheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subtheme */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the associated theme */,
  "subtheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the subtheme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subtheme */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the subtheme is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the subtheme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the subtheme was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valences" (
  "valence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valence type */,
  "valence_value" TEXT /* Value indicating positive or negative outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the valence type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the valence is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the valence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the valence was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population group */,
  "population_description" TEXT /* Description of the population group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the population group is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the population group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the population group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_precisions" (
  "geo_precision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical precision */,
  "precision_value" TEXT /* Value indicating the level of precision (e.g., County, State) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographical precision */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the geographical precision is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the geographical precision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the geographical precision was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_precision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data source is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the indicator */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the indicator */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used to access the indicator */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, spatial analysis) */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is confidential */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id")
)
